rootCause: The one-command runner delegated to prepare-pr without a browser-availability preflight, so grouped Playwright execution failed in browser-constrained local environments even when non-E2E gates were healthy.
resolution: Added a Playwright Chromium preflight script and wired run-tests.js to set SKIP_E2E=1 automatically in non-CI runs when Chromium is unavailable, while preserving strict CI E2E behavior. Added regression coverage for the new branch.
